comments.author: Sy0307
comments.body:
> Could you provide full benchmark result comparison before and after the PR?

+1. Plz show full benchmark result before/after this PR. I think some perf improvement is from removing seed-specific yaml.

comments.author: amy-why-3459
comments.body:
> > Could you provide full benchmark result comparison before and after the PR?
> 
> +1. Plz show full benchmark result before/after this PR. I think some perf improvement is from removing seed-specific yaml.

RTF is significantly lower at c≤8 (approximately 23–30%). Performance degrades under high concurrency because max_num_seqs is too small, causing a large number of requests to queue.

[vllm-omni_build_12118_full-moon-tts-star-perf-test.log](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29788708/vllm-omni_build_12118_full-moon-tts-star-perf-test.log)

comments.author: amy-why-3459
comments.body: > > Could you provide full benchmark result comparison before and after the PR? > > +1. Plz show full benchmark result before/after this PR. I think some perf improvement is from removing seed-specific yaml. ``` vllm bench serve --omni \ --host localhost --port 28889 \ --model Qwen/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-CustomVoice \ --backend openai-audio-speech \ --endpoint /v1/audio/speech \ --dataset-name seed-tts-text \ --dataset-path benchmarks/build_dataset/seed_tts_smoke \ --num-prompts 256 \ --max-concurrency 64 \ --request-rate inf \ --seed-tts-locale en \ --extra-body '{"voice":"Vivian","language":"English","task_type":"CustomVoice"}' \ --percentile-metrics ttft,e2el,audio_rtf,audio_ttfp,audio_duration \ --trust-remote-code \ --num-warmups 2 \ --save-result ```

reviews.author: Gaohan123
reviews.body: Could you provide full benchmark result comparison before and after the PR?

reviews.author: linyueqian
reviews.body:
LGTM — approving. Verified end-to-end on an H20 (8×H20-141GB) box.

To isolate this PR from the already-merged seed removal (thanks @Gaohan123 @Sy0307 for raising it), I ran an A/B of **main vs main + this PR** — same harness/spec, so both legs already have `seed` removed and every delta below is attributable to this PR alone. 9-cell smoke, 256/256 requests completed on both legs, no OOM with the new `max_num_batched_tokens=32768` / `max_num_seqs=64`.

### Performance (median, main → PR)

**CustomVoice (default_voice / voice_design):**
| conc | RTF | audio TTFP | audio throughput |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 0.129 → 0.107 (−17%) | 44 → 31 ms (−29%) | +21% |
| 32 | 0.605 → 0.326 (−46%) | 2399 → 258 ms (−89%) | +78% |
| 64 | 1.099 → 0.639 (−42%) | 5561 → 323 ms (−94%) | +90% |
| 256 | 2.651 → 1.381 (−48%) | 13755 → 5185 ms (−62%) | +63% |
| vd c32 | 0.603 → 0.323 (−46%) | 2390 → 187 ms (−92%) | +77% |

**Base (voice_clone):**
| conc | RTF | audio TTFP | audio throughput |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 0.144 → 0.121 (−16%) | 120 → 104 ms (−13%) | +20% |
| 32 | 0.909 → 0.704 (−23%) | 2838 → 1046 ms (−63%) | +30% |
| 64 | 1.270 → 1.132 (−11%) | 4694 → 1635 ms (−65%) | +14% |
| 256 | 3.100 → **3.252 (+5%)** | 12737 → 8349 ms (−35%) | +16% |

Big, real win — clearly independent of the seed removal.

### Quality (WER / SIM / UTMOS, Base + CustomVoice at c1 and c32)

Ran a separate A/B with the seed-tts-eval protocol (Whisper-large-v3 WER, WavLM SIM, UTMOS), 0 ASR failures on both legs:

- **W
